# images/

This folder stores all visualization outputs:

## Auto-generated charts (run `python main.py --evaluate`)
- `sentiment_distribution.png`          → Pie + bar chart
- `sentiment_by_brand.png`              → Grouped bar by brand
- `sentiment_by_platform.png`           → Stacked bar by platform
- `sentiment_trend_over_time.png`       → Daily line chart
- `vader_compound_distribution.png`     → VADER score histogram
- `model_accuracy_comparison.png`       → Bar chart of 3 models

## Confusion matrices (run `python main.py --train`)
- `logistic_regression_confusion_matrix.png`
- `naive_bayes_confusion_matrix.png`
- `random_forest_confusion_matrix.png`

## Manual screenshots (take these yourself)
- `dashboard_overview.png`
- `dashboard_live_predictor.png`
- `dashboard_brand_analysis.png`
- `day1_folder_structure.png`  through  `day7_github_repo.png`

**Add screenshots to README.md using:**
```markdown
![Dashboard](images/dashboard_overview.png)
```
